decks.notes: This deck focuses on creating a lock-down control strategy using artifact prison pieces to disrupt the opponent's game plan. By utilizing cards like Karn, the Great Creator, Trinisphere, and Sorcerous Spyglass, the deck aims to limit the opponent's options while ramping up to powerful late-game threats like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and Ugin, the Eye of the Storms. The combination of mana acceleration from Urza lands, Grim Monolith, and Candelabra of Tawnos, along with disruptive artifacts, creates a difficult board state for the opponent to navigate and allows the deck to establish dominance.

This Mardu Aggro deck focuses on quickly deploying aggressive creatures and disrupting the opponent's game plan with cards like Thoughtseize and Cabal Therapy. The deck aims to control the board with removal spells like Swords to Plowshares and utilize powerful creatures like Amped Raptor and Guide of Souls to apply pressure. With a mix of efficient creatures and disruptive spells, this deck looks to quickly overwhelm the opponent and secure victory.

The main concept of this Legacy Combo Doomsday deck is to quickly assemble the Doomsday combo while protecting it with counterspells and disruption. The goal is to use cards like Dark Ritual and Lotus Petal to generate mana to cast Doomsday, set up a winning pile with Thassa's Oracle, and then win the game on the spot. The deck includes cantrips like Brainstorm and Ponder to find key pieces, as well as disruption like Force of Will and Thoughtseize to disrupt opponents' plans. The inclusion of Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provides additional card draw and selection to fuel the combo.

The deck focuses on utilizing cheat-in effects like Show and Tell and Sneak Attack to quickly put powerful creatures like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and Atraxa, Grand Unifier onto the battlefield. By running disruptive spells like Flusterstorm and Force of Will, the deck aims to protect its combo pieces and disrupt opponents' game plans. With a combination of card draw spells like Brainstorm and Ponder, along with fast mana sources like Lotus Petal and Ancient Tomb, the deck aims to quickly assemble its combo and overwhelm the opponent with powerful threats.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming opponents with fast creatures and combat tricks. The key strategy is to deploy efficient threats such as Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Voice of Victory, while using cards like Hexing Squelcher and Static Prison to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The inclusion of Jegantha, the Wellspring as a companion allows for additional mana acceleration. The deck also includes land destruction with Wasteland and disruption with Goblin Bombardment. Overall, the goal is to maintain pressure on the opponent and close out the game swiftly.

The main concept of this deck is to disrupt the opponent's game plan while controlling the board with removal spells and counterspells. The deck aims to apply pressure with aggressive creatures such as Kaito, Bane of Nightmares and Orcish Bowmasters, backed up by card advantage engines like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student. The mana base is optimized for consistency and the inclusion of powerful cards like Murktide Regent and Brazen Borrower allow the deck to quickly close out games. Ultimately, the strategy revolves around maintaining tempo and outmaneuvering the opponent to secure victory.

This deck is focused on disrupting the opponent?s strategy while applying pressure with efficient creatures. By combining disruptive spells like Thoughtseize and Force of Will with powerful threats like Murktide Regent and Brazen Borrower, the deck aims to control the game tempo and close out matches quickly. The mana denial strategy with Wasteland and aggressive creatures like Barrowgoyf and Orcish Bowmasters create a difficult board state for the opponent to handle, allowing the deck to consistently apply pressure and disrupt the opponent's game plan.

The main concept of this Combo - Mystic Forge deck is to utilize cards such as Mystic Forge, Manifold Key, and Voltaic Key to generate infinite mana and casting spells for free. The deck focuses on manipulating artifacts and using them to create powerful combos, ultimately leading to a win condition like Karn, the Great Creator or Ugin, the Eye of the Storms. By combining artifact synergy with powerful planeswalkers and utility spells, the deck aims to outvalue and overwhelm the opponent in a Legacy 1 vs 1 format.

The deck focuses on assembling a combo with cards like Balustrade Spy and Undercity Informer to mill your entire library and win the game with Thassa's Oracle's ability. Using cards like Simian Spirit Guide and Lotus Petal, the deck aims to quickly power out its combo pieces while protecting itself with Pact of Negation. The deck also includes cards like Dark Ritual and Cabal Ritual to help accelerate its game plan. The goal is to quickly and efficiently combo off before the opponent has a chance to disrupt the strategy.

The main concept of this Mardu Aggro deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures and disruptive spells. By utilizing cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Amped Raptor to apply pressure, along with Thoughtseize and Cabal Therapy to disrupt the opponent's game plan, the deck aims to establish dominance early on and maintain control throughout the match. The mana base is carefully constructed to support the aggressive strategy, with a mix of dual lands and fetch lands to ensure consistent access to the necessary colors of mana.

The deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan with discard spells like Thoughtseize and Hymn to Tourach, while also having removal spells like Fatal Push to deal with threats. It aims to control the board with counterspells like Force of Will and Daze, and disrupt the opponent's mana base with cards like Wasteland. The deck also has powerful threats like Murktide Regent and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares to close out games quickly. Overall, the deck looks to maintain tempo and pressure the opponent while disrupting their strategy.

The deck focuses on using efficient creatures and disruptive spells to attack the opponent aggressively and quickly. It aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan with cards like Thoughtseize and Dauthi Voidwalker while applying pressure with creatures like Orcish Bowmasters and Nethergoyf. The deck uses cards like Dark Ritual and Moonshadow to quickly deploy threats and maintain a fast pace of play. With a mix of removal spells and resilient creatures, the deck looks to overwhelm the opponent and secure a victory in a short amount of time.

The main concept of this deck is to establish control over the game by utilizing artifacts to create a prison-like strategy. By combining mana ramp cards like Grim Monolith and Urza's Tower with powerful artifacts such as The One Ring and Planar Nexus, the deck aims to lock down the opponent's options while simultaneously generating advantage through Tezzeret, Cruel Captain and Karn, the Great Creator. With disruptive tools like Pithing Needle and Tormod's Crypt, as well as win condition cards like Ugin, Eye of the Storms, the deck aims to control the game and secure victory.

The deck focuses on cheating powerful creatures like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn into play quickly using cards like Show and Tell and Sneak Attack. By doing so, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with massive threats before they can establish a defense. The deck includes cards like Force of Will and Veil of Summer to protect the combo pieces and disrupt opponent's strategies. The goal is to win the game by resolving a Show and Tell or Sneak Attack to put a game-winning threat into play.

This deck focuses on utilizing aggressive creatures with the Stompy ability to quickly take control of the game. By playing powerful threats like Archon of Emeria and Chancellor of the Annex early on, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan and apply pressure. The inclusion of cards like Solitude and Witch Enchanter provide additional removal and support for the aggressive strategy. With a mix of efficient creatures and disruptive spells, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents and secure victory through early aggression and board control.

This deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana using Cloudpost lands and Grim Monoliths to cast powerful Eldrazi creatures such as Ulamog and Thought-Knot Seer. The key strategy is to disrupt opponents with cards like Chalice of the Void and Trinisphere while also using Planar Nexus and Karn, the Great Creator to control the board. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents with huge threats while preventing them from effectively casting spells, ultimately allowing the player to establish dominance and win the game quickly.
